NKJV.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD from the heavens; Praise Him in the heights!
NKJV.2: Praise Him, all His angels; Praise Him, all His hosts!
NKJV.3: Praise Him, sun and moon; Praise Him, all you stars of light!
NKJV.4: Praise Him, you heavens of heavens, And you waters above the heavens!
NKJV.5: Let them praise the name of the LORD, For He commanded and they were created.
NKJV.6: He also established them forever and ever; He made a decree which shall not pass away.
NKJV.7: Praise the LORD from the earth,  You great sea creatures and all the depths;
NKJV.8: Fire and hail, snow and clouds; Stormy wind, fulfilling His word;
NKJV.9: Mountains and all hills; Fruitful trees and all cedars;
NKJV.10: Beasts and all cattle; Creeping things and flying fowl;
NKJV.11: Kings of the earth and all peoples; Princes and all judges of the earth;
NKJV.12: Both young men and maidens; Old men and children.
NKJV.13: Let them praise the name of the LORD, For His name alone is exalted; His glory is above the earth and heaven.
NKJV.14: And He has exalted the horn of His people, The praise of all His saints— Of the children of Israel,  A people near to Him. Praise the LORD!

KJV.8: Fire<S>784</S>, and hail<S>1259</S>; snow<S>7950</S>, and vapour<S>7008</S>; stormy<S>5591</S> wind<S>7307</S> fulfilling<S>6213</S> his word<S>1697</S>:

ESV.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD from the heavens; praise him in the heights!
ESV.2: Praise him, all his angels; praise him, all his hosts!
ESV.3: Praise him, sun and moon, praise him, all you shining stars!
ESV.4: Praise him, you highest heavens, and you waters above the heavens!
ESV.5: Let them praise the name of the LORD! For he commanded and they were created.
ESV.6: And he established them forever and ever; he gave a decree, and it shall not pass away.
ESV.7: Praise the LORD from the earth, you great sea creatures and all deeps,
ESV.8: fire and hail, snow and mist, stormy wind fulfilling his word!
ESV.9: Mountains and all hills, fruit trees and all cedars!
ESV.10: Beasts and all livestock, creeping things and flying birds!
ESV.11: Kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all rulers of the earth!
ESV.12: Young men and maidens together, old men and children!
ESV.13: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for his name alone is exalted; his majesty is above earth and heaven.
ESV.14: He has raised up a horn for his people, praise for all his saints, for the people of Israel who are near to him. Praise the LORD!

NASB.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD from the heavens; Praise Him in the heights!
NASB.2: Praise Him, all His angels; Praise Him, all His hosts!
NASB.3: Praise Him, sun and moon; Praise Him, all stars of light!
NASB.4: Praise Him, highest heavens, And the waters that are above the heavens!
NASB.5: Let them praise the name of the LORD, For He commanded and they were created.
NASB.6: He has also established them forever and ever; He has made a decree which will not pass away.
NASB.7: Praise the LORD from the earth, Sea monsters and all deeps;
NASB.8: Fire and hail, snow and clouds; Stormy wind, fulfilling His word;
NASB.9: Mountains and all hills; Fruit trees and all cedars;
NASB.10: Beasts and all cattle; Creeping things and winged fowl;
NASB.11: Kings of the earth and all peoples; Princes and all judges of the earth;
NASB.12: Both young men and virgins; Old men and children.
NASB.13: Let them praise the name of the LORD, For His name alone is exalted; His glory is above earth and heaven.
NASB.14: And He has lifted up a horn for His people, Praise for all His godly ones; [Even] for the sons of Israel, a people near to Him. Praise the LORD!

NLT.1:
Praise the LORD!
Praise the LORD from the heavens!
Praise him from the skies!
NLT.2:
Praise him, all his angels!
Praise him, all the armies of heaven!
NLT.3:
Praise him, sun and moon!
Praise him, all you twinkling stars!
NLT.4:
Praise him, skies above!
Praise him, vapors high above the clouds!
NLT.5:
Let every created thing give praise to the LORD,
for he issued his command, and they came into being.
NLT.6:
He set them in place forever and ever.
His decree will never be revoked.
NLT.7:
Praise the LORD from the earth,
you creatures of the ocean depths,
NLT.8:
fire and hail, snow and clouds,
wind and weather that obey him,
NLT.9:
mountains and all hills,
fruit trees and all cedars,
NLT.10:
wild animals and all livestock,
small scurrying animals and birds,
NLT.11:
kings of the earth and all people,
rulers and judges of the earth,
NLT.12:
young men and young women,
old men and children.
NLT.13:
Let them all praise the name of the LORD.
For his name is very great;
his glory towers over the earth and heaven!
NLT.14:
He has made his people strong,
honoring his faithful ones —
the people of Israel who are close to him.
Praise the LORD!

WEB.1: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh from the heavens! Praise him in the heights!
WEB.2: Praise him, all his angels! Praise him, all his army!
WEB.3: Praise him, sun and moon! Praise him, all you shining stars!
WEB.4: Praise him, you heavens of heavens, You waters that are above the heavens.
WEB.5: Let them praise Yahweh’s name, For he commanded, and they were created.
WEB.6: He has also established them forever and ever. He has made a decree which will not pass away.
WEB.7: Praise Yahweh from the earth, you great sea creatures, and all depths;
WEB.8: lightning and hail, snow and clouds; stormy wind, fulfilling his word;
WEB.9: mountains and all hills; fruit trees and all cedars;
WEB.10: wild animals and all livestock; small creatures and flying birds;
WEB.11: kings of the earth and all peoples; princes and all judges of the earth;
WEB.12: both young men and maidens; old men and children:
WEB.13: let them praise Yahweh’s name, for his name alone is exalted. His glory is above the earth and the heavens.
WEB.14: He has lifted up the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; even of the children of Israel, a people near to him. Praise Yah!

CSB17.1:
Hallelujah!
Praise the LORD from the heavens;
praise him in the heights. ⓕ
CSB17.2:
Praise him, all his angels;
praise him, all his heavenly armies. ⓖ
CSB17.3:
Praise him, sun and moon;
praise him, all you shining stars. ⓗ
CSB17.4:
Praise him, highest heavens,
and you waters above the heavens. ⓘ
CSB17.5:
Let them praise the name of the LORD,
for he commanded, and they were created. ⓙ
CSB17.6:
He set them in position forever and ever;
he gave an order that will never pass away. ⓚ
CSB17.7:
Praise the LORD from the earth,
all sea monsters and ocean depths, ⓛ
CSB17.8:
lightning [1] and hail, snow and cloud,
stormy wind that executes his command, ⓜ
CSB17.9:
mountains and all hills,
fruit trees and all cedars, ⓝ
CSB17.10:
wild animals and all cattle,
creatures that crawl and flying birds, ⓐ
CSB17.11:
kings of the earth and all peoples,
princes and all judges of the earth, ⓑ
CSB17.12:
young men as well as young women,
old and young together. ⓒ
CSB17.13:
Let them praise the name of the LORD,
for his name alone is exalted.
His majesty covers heaven and earth. ⓓ
CSB17.14:
He has raised up a horn for his people,
resulting in praise to all his faithful ones,
to the Israelites, the people close to him. ⓔ
Hallelujah!

AMP.1:
Praise the LORD!
Praise the LORD from the heavens;
Praise Him in the heights!
AMP.2:
Praise Him, all His angels;
Praise Him, all His hosts (armies)!
AMP.3:
Praise Him, sun and moon:
Praise Him, all stars of light!
AMP.4:
Praise Him, highest heavens,
And the waters above the heavens!
AMP.5:
Let them praise the name of the LORD,
For He commanded and they were created.
AMP.6:
He has also established them forever and ever;
He has made a decree which shall not pass away.
AMP.7:
Praise the LORD from the earth,
Sea monsters and all deeps;
AMP.8:
Lightning and hail, snow and fog;
Stormy wind, fulfilling His orders;
AMP.9:
Mountains and all hills;
Fruitful trees and all cedars;
AMP.10:
Beasts and all cattle;
Creeping things and winged birds;
AMP.11:
Kings of the earth and all people;
Princes and all judges of the earth;
AMP.12:
Both young men and virgins;
Old men and children.
AMP.13:
Let them praise the name of the LORD,
For His name alone is exalted and supreme;
His glory and majesty are above earth and heaven.
AMP.14:
He has lifted up a horn for His people [giving them strength, prosperity, dignity, and preeminence],
Praise for all His godly ones;
For the people of Israel, a people near to Him.
Praise the LORD! (Hallelujah!)

MSG.1:
Hallelujah!
Praise God from heaven,
praise him from the mountaintops;
MSG.2:
Praise him, all you his angels,
praise him, all you his warriors,
MSG.3:
Praise him, sun and moon,
praise him, you morning stars;
MSG.4:
Praise him, high heaven,
praise him, heavenly rain clouds;
MSG.5:
Praise, oh let them praise the name of God—
he spoke the word, and there they were!
MSG.6:
He set them in place
from all time to eternity;
He gave his orders,
and that's it!
MSG.7:
Praise God from earth,
you sea dragons, you fathomless ocean deeps;
MSG.8:
Fire and hail, snow and ice,
hurricanes obeying his orders;
MSG.9:
Mountains and all hills,
apple orchards and cedar forests;
MSG.10:
Wild beasts and herds of cattle,
snakes, and birds in flight;
MSG.11:
Earth's kings and all races,
leaders and important people,
MSG.12:
Robust men and women in their prime,
and yes, graybeards and little children.
MSG.13:
Let them praise the name of God—
it's the only Name worth praising.
His radiance exceeds anything in earth and sky;
MSG.14:
he's built a monument—his very own people!
Praise from all who love God!
Israel's children, intimate friends of God.
Hallelujah!

NIV.1:
Psalm 148
Praise the Lord.
Praise the Lord from the heavens,
praise him in the heights above.
NIV.2:
Praise him, all his angels,
praise him, all his heavenly hosts.
NIV.3:
Praise him, sun and moon,
praise him, all you shining stars.
NIV.4:
Praise him, you highest heavens
and you waters above the skies.
NIV.5:
Let them praise the name of the Lord,
for he commanded and they were created.
NIV.6:
He set them in place for ever and ever;
he gave a decree that will never pass away.
NIV.7:
Praise the Lord from the earth,
you great sea creatures and all ocean depths,
NIV.8:
lightning and hail, snow and clouds,
stormy winds that do his bidding,
NIV.9:
you mountains and all hills,
fruit trees and all cedars,
NIV.10:
wild animals and all cattle,
small creatures and flying birds,
NIV.11:
kings of the earth and all nations,
you princes and all rulers on earth,
NIV.12:
young men and maidens,
old men and children.
NIV.13:
Let them praise the name of the Lord,
for his name alone is exalted;
his splendor is above the earth and the heavens.
NIV.14:
He has raised up for his people a horn,
the praise of all his saints,
of Israel, the people close to his heart.
Praise the Lord.

NRSVCE.1:
Praise the LORD!
Praise the LORD from the heavens;
praise him in the heights!
NRSVCE.2:
Praise him, all his angels;
praise him, all his host!
NRSVCE.3:
Praise him, sun and moon;
praise him, all you shining stars!
NRSVCE.4:
Praise him, you highest heavens,
and you waters above the heavens!
NRSVCE.5:
Let them praise the name of the LORD,
for he commanded and they were created.
NRSVCE.6:
He established them forever and ever;
he fixed their bounds, which cannot be passed.
NRSVCE.7:
Praise the LORD from the earth,
you sea monsters and all deeps,
NRSVCE.8:
fire and hail, snow and frost,
stormy wind fulfilling his command!
NRSVCE.9:
Mountains and all hills,
fruit trees and all cedars!
NRSVCE.10:
Wild animals and all cattle,
creeping things and flying birds!
NRSVCE.11:
Kings of the earth and all peoples,
princes and all rulers of the earth!
NRSVCE.12:
Young men and women alike,
old and young together!
NRSVCE.13:
Let them praise the name of the LORD,
for his name alone is exalted;
his glory is above earth and heaven.
NRSVCE.14:
He has raised up a horn for his people,
praise for all his faithful,
for the people of Israel who are close to him.
Praise the LORD!

NET.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD from the sky! Praise him in the heavens!
NET.2: Praise him, all his angels! Praise him, all his heavenly assembly!
NET.3: Praise him, O sun and moon! Praise him, all you shiny stars!
NET.4: Praise him, O highest heaven, and you waters above the sky!
NET.5: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for he gave the command and they came into existence.
NET.6: He established them so they would endure; he issued a decree that will not be revoked.
NET.7: Praise the LORD from the earth, you sea creatures and all you ocean depths,
NET.8: O fire and hail, snow and clouds, O stormy wind that carries out his orders,
NET.9: you mountains and all you hills, you fruit trees and all you cedars,
NET.10: you animals and all you cattle, you creeping things and birds,
NET.11: you kings of the earth and all you nations, you princes and all you leaders on the earth,
NET.12: you young men and young women, you elderly, along with you children!
NET.13: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for his name alone is exalted; his majesty extends over the earth and sky.
NET.14: He has made his people victorious, and given all his loyal followers reason to praise — the Israelites, the people who are close to him. Praise the LORD!
